title: Did Candace Owens’ producer and manager quit? Ben Shapiro appears to confirm staff exit rumors
summary_full: Rumors surrounding Candace Owens gained momentum after a viral post claimed her top producer and manager had quit. The speculation intensified when Ben Shapiro referenced the alleged departures while discussing online influence in conservative media. His remarks sparked widespread debate on social media, with users questioning the stability and institutional power of major political commentary brands driven largely by internet audiences.
